headline: Starbucks' Traffic Trends Improve: Is the Recovery Taking Shape?
summary: SBUX posts 4% global comparable sales growth as transactions rise, with U.S. transaction growth returning after eight quarters, signaling improving demand.

headline: Wary Shoppers Drag Consumer Discretionary Earnings to 2020 Low
summary: Only 56% of companies in the S&P 500 consumer discretionary sector beat GAAP earnings estimates in the fourth quarter, according to Bloomberg Intelligence data.  Consumers remain “choiceful” as inflation lingers, while tariffs hurt gross margins in the back half of 2025, said Steven Shemesh, a consumer discretionary equity analyst at RBC Capital Markets Corp.

headline: Starbucks Corp (NASDAQ:SBUX) Shows Strong Technical Setup for a Potential Breakout
